🌇 Henge Tracker

Find streets where the rising or setting sun lines up down the road — and isn't blocked by buildings. Full 3D occlusion from building heights.
…
Clear = sun visible above the skyline down the road. Blocked = a building occludes the low sun. Click a street or list item for details. Data: Engine computes sun azimuth/elevation and ray-traces building rooflines along each street.
Legend
Clear — sun visible down the road
Blocked — building occludes the sun
Your location
Selected sightline
Tip: click anywhere on the map to set your location
